name: Last Chance To Be With You
description:
A weekend at your friend’s family beach house threatens to unravel everything.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

The study group started by accident. A few shared classes, some panicked messages before midterms, and suddenly it was a ritual.

Three nights a week in the same quiet corner of the library.

There’s Kai, the bratty instigator, who treats life like a performance art piece.

Zoe was always energetic and fiercely competitive. Always the first to suggest a party you could all go to.

Ryan was the quiet, observant anchor of the group. A solid friend.

In senior year, that all changed with the arrival of Nikki.

She was older than the rest of you. A returning student finishing a degree she started a lifetime ago. She folded into the group with an ease that made you forget the decade age difference.

She had a way of listening that makes you feel like you’re the only person in the room, of laughing at your dumb jokes like they’re the funniest thing she’s ever heard.

It feels like something is building, a secret the two of you are writing without saying a word.

But her arrival has changed the group dynamics in subtle ways... and it's all coming to a head.

On the last night of finals, Kai announces that his uncle's beach house is free next weekend and he has a plan: “A whole weekend. Just us. No rules.”

Zoe immediately started planning outfits. Ryan shrugged a calm agreement. All eyes turned to Nikki. She hesitated, just for a second, a shadow crossing her face before she locked eyes with you and smiled. “I’m in.”

It felt less like an answer to Kai and more like a promise to you.

The beach house waits, a glass and wood haven perched on the edge of the ocean. A week of sun, salt, and the thrill of the unknown stretches out before you.

But Nikki carries a secret that could shatter the summer air, and the look in her eyes says you’re at the very center of it.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

The Cast
creator: Greatn
